description: A screen-capture of a Fox Business television broadcast (not an agency-original design), showing an on-air infographic. A white-bordered header banner reads 'NOVEMBER JOBS REPORT' with a black sub-banner 'FOREIGN-BORN VS. NATIVE-BORN WORKERS.' Two large side-by-side blue stat panels show a green down-arrow with '21,000 FOREIGN-BORN JOBS' on the left and a green up-arrow with '2.63M NATIVE-BORN JOBS' on the right; gold text below credits 'BUREAU OF LABOR STATISTICS.' A Fox Business logo, time stamp '4:37P MT,' hosts' names 'w/ DAGEN MCDOWELL & BRIAN BRENBERG,' a market ticker (CRUDE OIL, GOLD, INDEX RECAP) and a 'SCAN THE QR CODE / DOWNLOAD THE APP' box appear at the bottom. The faintly visible silhouetted-crowd background is part of the TV graphic. The DOL tweet captions it 'MERRY CHRISTMAS, PATRIOTS! We are just getting started.' Although it is a designed infographic, it originates from a Fox Business broadcast and is reposted as a screenshot, so is_designed=false; the message amplifies a native-born-vs-foreign-born jobs framing supporting the administration's labor narrative.
notable_text: NOVEMBER JOBS REPORT; FOREIGN-BORN VS. NATIVE-BORN WORKERS; down 21,000 FOREIGN-BORN JOBS; up 2.63M NATIVE-BORN JOBS; BUREAU OF LABOR STATISTICS
